name: jscpd
purpose: Copy-paste and duplicated-code detection for source, tests, scripts, and configuration files.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view jscpd version license repository.url --json` reported license `MIT` and repository `git+https://github.com/kucherenko/jscpd.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: jscpd is a dedicated copy-paste detector for JavaScript, TypeScript, and other text formats.
